index_pattern.description: Index pattern of Elasticsearch indices to list

name: get_mappings
description: Get field mappings for a specific Elasticsearch index

index.description: Name of the Elasticsearch index to get mappings for

name: search
description: Perform an Elasticsearch search with the provided query DSL.

index.description: Name of the Elasticsearch index to search

fields.description: Name of the fields that need to be returned (optional)

query_body.description: Complete Elasticsearch query DSL object that can include query, size, from, sort, etc.

name: get_shards
description: Get shard information for all or specific indices.

index.description: Optional index name to get shard information for
